chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-206 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 05-11-2025. Mr. Shoukat Ali Rahimoon advocate for petitioners a/w petitioners. Mr. Rao Faisal Ali advocate for the respondent No.5 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G. = Petitioner No.1 Mst. Arifa is present in person and submits that she has contracted marriage of free will with petitioner No.2 Ayaz Ali, which annoyed her parents and they have danger of their lives on account of un- ceremonial marriage. Pursuant to notice, S.S.P, Tharparkar @ Mithi, S.H.O P.S Diplo and S.H.O PS Kaloi have filed their replies, wherein they have stated that petitioners would be dealt in accordance with law and undertake to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. Petitioner No.1 had a meeting with her mother, who was in appearance before this Court. After meeting, she submits that she intends to join her husband/ petitioner No.2. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners on account of their un-ceremonial marriage and to provide due protection to them. JUDGE *Saleem*
